scope.goal: unattended automated closure of the remaining target-architecture gap up to the final manual-regression gate

governing_reconciliation.policy: wrapper must refuse ALL_AUTOMATABLE_TASKS_DONE when any governing doc is newer than this reconciliation stamp

tasks.title: Historical baseline phase
tasks.summary: Historical baseline freeze completed and retained only as context.
done_when: Historical baseline is recorded

tasks.title: Historical application bootstrap phase
tasks.summary: Application bootstrap and first use-case port setup are already complete.
done_when: Historical bootstrap phase is recorded as completed

tasks.title: Historical module migration phase
tasks.summary: Photos, RollCall, and Presentation core migration are already complete.
done_when: Historical module migration phase is recorded as completed

tasks.title: Historical boundary hardening phase
tasks.summary: Boundary guards are already established and moved into the ongoing architecture guard path.
done_when: Historical boundary hardening phase is recorded as completed

tasks.title: Completed first-batch overlay presentation router slice
tasks.summary: Overlay presentation routing slice is already complete and documented in the interop matrix and progress doc.
done_when: Overlay presentation routing slice remains completed

tasks.title: Completed first-batch RollCall remote hook slice
tasks.summary: RollCall remote hook coordination slice is already complete and documented.
done_when: RollCall remote hook slice remains completed

tasks.title: Completed first-batch RollCall window style boundary slice
tasks.summary: RollCall window style execution boundary slice is already complete and documented.
done_when: RollCall window style boundary slice remains completed

tasks.title: Reconcile current dirty worktree with execution docs
tasks.summary: Map the current dirty worktree to the main plan, progress doc, and handover.
done_when: Current dirty worktree progress is represented in tasks or state
Minimum required docs are synced
No unrelated changes are reverted

tasks.title: Close remaining MainWindow lifecycle and runtime tail work
tasks.summary: MainWindow lifecycle tail is already closed through policy/state extraction and verified by the targeted lifecycle filter plus ArchitectureDependencyTests.
done_when: Remaining MainWindow lifecycle tail logic no longer depends on inline hotspot branching
Related MainWindow lifecycle policy tests pass
ArchitectureDependencyTests still pass

tasks.title: Close remaining MainWindow launcher and Z-order tail work
tasks.summary: Verified the existing launcher-resolution, dispatch-queue, and Z-order queue rollback closure through the targeted MainWindow queue/policy filter plus ArchitectureDependencyTests.
done_when: Remaining launcher and Z-order queue tail logic is policy-driven or executor-driven
Launcher and Z-order targeted tests pass
ArchitectureDependencyTests still pass

tasks.title: Close remaining Overlay presentation tail work
tasks.summary: Verified the existing Overlay presentation tail closure through the presentation-focused filter and ArchitectureDependencyTests without re-expanding direct coupling.
done_when: Remaining Overlay presentation tail logic is routed through policies or router boundaries
Presentation targeted tests pass
ArchitectureDependencyTests still pass

tasks.title: Close remaining Overlay input tail work
tasks.summary: Verified the existing Overlay input tail closure through the targeted input/pointer-source filter and ArchitectureDependencyTests without reopening hotspot inline branches.
done_when: Remaining Overlay input tail logic no longer depends on ad-hoc inline event handling branches
Input and pointer-source targeted tests pass
ArchitectureDependencyTests still pass

tasks.title: Close remaining cross-page consistency tail work
tasks.summary: Verified existing cross-page consistency tail closure through the targeted CrossPage/Photo/Overlay filter and ArchitectureDependencyTests (903/903).
done_when: The remaining cross-page tail no longer depends on move-or-zoom compensation behavior
Cross-page targeted tests pass
ArchitectureDependencyTests still pass

tasks.title: Choose and wire the next SQLite business domain
tasks.summary: Deferred as an oversized umbrella task and split into scoped child tasks for domain decision, adapter implementation, and app wiring closure.
done_when: At least one new business domain uses SQLite as the primary automated path
Its read or write path is covered by targeted tests

tasks.title: Finalize SQLite domain choice for student workbook data
tasks.summary: Finalized student workbook/class roster as the next SQLite business domain beyond RollCall and synced boundary plus rollback expectation across progress/handover/runbook docs.
done_when: The chosen business domain beyond RollCall is explicit and consistent across execution docs
Domain boundary and rollback expectation are recorded for follow-up implementation

commands: rg -n "SQLite|sqlite|鐝骇|鍚嶅唽|student workbook|class roster" docs/validation/2026-03-06-target-architecture-progress.md docs/handover.md docs/runbooks/migration-rollback-playbook.md

tasks.title: Implement SQLite-backed student workbook adapter with tests
tasks.summary: Implemented a dedicated StudentWorkbook SQLite adapter with snapshot/state persistence and focused read/write/fallback tests.
done_when: Student workbook domain has a dedicated SQLite adapter path
Targeted adapter tests cover at least one read path and one write path

tasks.title: Wire student workbook SQLite path into runtime selection
tasks.summary: Wired runtime selection to StudentWorkbook SQLite path via StudentWorkbookSqliteRollCallStoreAdapter, added startup guardrail log wording, and passed resolver/store/repository/sqlite plus ArchitectureDependencyTests filter (113/113).
done_when: Runtime backend selection can resolve to the new student workbook SQLite path
Targeted wiring and guard tests pass without increasing App->Interop direct dependency baseline

tasks.title: Close SQLite migration and rollback tail work
tasks.summary: Closed SQLite migration/rollback tail by confirming student-workbook fallback-read coverage and syncing rollback/progress/handover docs; task filter passed (85/85).
done_when: Migration or fallback coverage exists for the new SQLite domain
Rollback runbook is updated
Storage-tail targeted tests pass

tasks.title: Finish Ink capability and fallback guardrails
tasks.summary: Verified Ink capability detection and CPU/GPU fallback guardrails via targeted Ink/Renderer/Brush filter (252/252), with CPU remaining the safe primary path when GPU is unavailable or gated off.
done_when: Renderer entry points expose clear capability and fallback behavior
GPU failure does not affect CPU primary behavior
Ink and renderer targeted tests pass

tasks.title: Run automated freeze acceptance only
tasks.summary: Completed automated freeze acceptance by passing ArchitectureDependencyTests (5/5), full Debug (2214/2214), and full Release (2214/2214), while leaving real manual regression omitted from unattended scope.
done_when: Architecture guard tests pass
Debug full test suite passes
Release full test suite passes
Acceptance, progress, and handover docs reflect automated freeze status

tasks.title: Finish scene-switch windowing, activation, and topmost coordination closure
tasks.summary: Verified existing scene-switch windowing/activation/topmost coordination closure through the task-targeted filter (WindowOrchestrator|Topmost|Presentation|Launcher|ArchitectureDependencyTests, 379/379).
done_when: Image/PDF/whiteboard/PPT-WPS switching no longer depends on scattered activation or topmost compensation branches
Launcher, toolbar, Overlay, RollCall, and ImageManager window relationships are coordinated through Session or Windowing paths
Targeted windowing and presentation tests pass without increasing App to Interop baseline

tasks.title: Consolidate remaining MainWindow scattered state writes
tasks.summary: Remaining automatable cleanup of MainWindow hotspot state writes into Session, Updater, Policy, or Executor paths.
done_when: Remaining MainWindow hotspot state writes are consolidated into Session, Updater, Policy, or Executor paths
No new inline state-repair logic is added to MainWindow hotspot files
Targeted MainWindow tests and ArchitectureDependencyTests pass

tasks.title: Extend SQLite beyond student workbook into the next history domain
tasks.summary: Deferred as an oversized umbrella task and split into scoped child tasks for history-domain selection, adapter implementation, and runtime migration/rollback closure.
done_when: At least one history-oriented business domain uses SQLite as the primary automated path
Migration, fallback-read, and rollback coverage exist for that domain
Targeted storage tests pass

tasks.title: Finalize next history-oriented SQLite domain scope
tasks.summary: Select one concrete history-oriented business domain and align boundary, migration expectation, and rollback scope across execution docs.
done_when: A concrete history-oriented business domain is explicitly selected beyond student workbook
Domain boundary and migration plus rollback expectation are consistent across progress, handover, and runbook docs

tasks.title: Implement SQLite adapter for the selected history domain
tasks.summary: Implement SQLite-backed adapter path for the selected history-oriented domain with focused read/write and fallback tests.
done_when: Selected history-oriented domain has a dedicated SQLite adapter path
Targeted tests cover at least one primary read path and one write path
Fallback-read behavior is covered when bridge or source path fails

tasks.title: Wire selected history-domain SQLite path with migration and rollback coverage
tasks.summary: Completed Ink history SQLite runtime wiring via sidecar bridge + adapter path, synced migration/rollback docs, and passed the task-targeted History|Store|Repository|Sqlite|Migration filter (98/98).
done_when: Runtime selection can resolve to the selected history-domain SQLite path
Migration and rollback expectations are reflected in runbook and synced docs
Task-targeted history/storage/migration verification passes

tasks.title: Close the remaining GPU Ink optional-release strategy gap
tasks.summary: Closed GPU Ink optional-release strategy gap: kept CPU as stable default, enforced dual-gate GPU enablement with safe fallback, aligned release-facing docs, and passed task verify filter (Ink|Renderer|Brush|Gpu: 259/259).
done_when: GPU Ink enablement and fallback behavior are explicit and release-facing docs match the implemented policy
CPU remains the stable default path and GPU failure cannot destabilize the session
Targeted Ink, renderer, and GPU-related tests pass

tasks.title: Re-run automated freeze acceptance after remaining automatable gap closure
tasks.summary: Completed post-gap automated freeze recheck by passing ArchitectureDependencyTests (5/5), full Debug (2227/2227), and full Release (2227/2227), with acceptance/progress/handover/matrix docs synced.
done_when: Architecture guard tests pass
Debug full test suite passes
Release full test suite passes
Acceptance, progress, and handover docs reflect the post-gap-closure freeze result

tasks.title: Real manual final regression
tasks.summary: Real PPT, WPS, image, PDF, whiteboard, and window-relationship regression in a live environment.
done_when: Live environment regression is executed by a human
